notes: The sector now has a pulse. New 🌐 Sector Relations (Politics tab): the five great powers track a persistent Alliance/Peace/Cold War/War relationship with EACH OTHER, independent of your own reputation with them. It evolves on its own — rivals drift toward war, everyone else settles toward peace — and occasional named incidents (a border skirmish, a trade accord) can tip a pair into a new state, reported in the log and a new cycle recap. Your own active letters of marque stoke the specific rivalry you're fighting for. This is the foundation of a broader living-sector layer to come.
